sections.sectionTitle: Esther in An Ne dingin Kumpipa leh Haman Sam

verses.text: A ni thum ni-in Esther in a kumpipuan silhin kumpipa' inntual sungnungah dingin kumpi inn lam a nga hi. Kumpi innsung a kumpi tokhom tungah kumpipa tu-in kongpi lam na nga hi

Inntualah Kumpinu Esther dinga a om kumpipa in a muh ciangin Esther in kumpipa' maipha ngah a, kumpipa in a khuta a tawi kumpi ciangkhut pen Esther' lamah a zan hi. Tua ciangin Esther in hong naihin tua ciangkhut dawn va lawng hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Kumpinu Esther aw, bang thu ahi hiam? Kei tungah nong nget peuhpeuh, ka kumpi gam phelkhat ciangdong, nang tungah hong kipia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Esther in, “Nong hehpih zawh leh, kumpipa-a' dinga kong bawlsak nitak an a ne dingin tuni-in Haman tawh hong pai un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in, “Esther' deih bangin i gamtat theihna dingin manlangin Haman va sam un,” a ci hi. Tua ahih manin Esther' bawlsak nitak an a ne dingin kumpipa leh Haman hong pai uh hi
Amaute in zu a nek laitakun kumpipa in Esther' kiangah, “Nong nget peuhpeuh hong kipia ding hi. Nong nget peuhpeuh ka kumpi gam phelkhat ciangdong nangawn hong kipia ding hi,” a ci hi
Esther in dawngin, “Nang tung panin kong ngetnop kong thumnop thu in

Topa aw, nong hehpih zawh a, na lung a kim a, kong nget thu nong piakzawh ding leh, note gel-a' dingin ka na bawl an a ne dingin zing ciangin kumpipa leh Haman hong pai un. Zing ciangin nong cih bangin ka deihna kong gen ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ahih ciangin lungdam kipakin tua ni-in Haman a ciah hi. Ahih hangin kongpi-a om Mordekai in amah zahtakna limin a mai-ah dinglo, kunlo-a om a muh ciangin Mordekai tungah nakpi takin a heh hi
Ahi zongin Haman ki-ip tentanin inn-ah a ciah hi. Tua ciangin a lawmte leh a zi Zeresh sam a

ama hauhna teng, a tapa neih teng, kumpipa in amah a pahtak manin a za a khan'sakna teng, leh kumpipa' nasemte leh ulian dangte khempeuh sangin a lianzaw-in amah a koihna thute khempeuh amaute tungah genin a lak hi

Tua ciangin Haman in, “Tua tengbek hi nailo lai hi. Kumpinu Esther nangawn in ama bawlsa an kumpipa tawh a nekhawm dingin kei simloh midang kuamah paisaklo hi. Zing ciangin zong kumpipa tawh kei hong samkhawm hi
Ahi zongin kumpipa' kongpi-a a tu Jew mi Mordekai ka muh laiteng hih thute khempeuh a mawkna suak zel hi,” ci lai hi

Tua ciangin a zi Zeresh leh a lawmte khempeuh in ama kiangah, “Pi sawmsagihnga a sang khuam phutsak in la, tua tungah Mordekai a kikhailupna dingin zingciangin kumpipa kiangah gen in. Tua ciangin nitak an ne dingin lungnuam takin kumpipa tawh pai in,” a ci uh hi. Haman in hih ngaihsutna hoihsa a, a khuam a phutsak hi.
